'''Grabworms''' were giant predatory worms native to [[Toydaria/Legends|Toydaria]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. Swamps were grabworms' natural habitat. The [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarians]] evolved with wings, allowing them to escape the grabworm's lunges.

{{Creature-stub}}
